title: Lead SEO Specialist at Xpressbees International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Xpressbees International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the Xpressbees International Enterprises family as a SEO Specialist in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Xpressbees International Enterprises:
Xpressbees International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees International Enterprises!
